location: Atop a bell tower in Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree. From the Prayer Room Site of Grace, head out past a seated Haligtree Soldier, cross a parapet on the right onto a tower, loop around its outer ledge to a ladder, and climb to the top.

source.name: Top of the bell tower, Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree

tactics: From the Prayer Room grace, proceed toward the seated Haligtree Soldier-type enemy near the tower approach.
Take the parapet on the right leading onto the tower, then follow its outer rim around to find a ladder on the far side.
Climb the ladder to the very top of the tower to find the sword — no fight required at the pickup itself, but nearby Haligtree enemies are dangerous.
lore: Crafted by servants of Miquella's Haligtree in the image of Carian knight swords, but set with Haligtree amber instead of glintstone — a beautiful blade that, tragically, was never given to any knight to bear.

builds.name: Faith/Dex hybrid
builds.why: D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling plus E Faith and a Holy-infused Sacred Blade skill let it pair well with a light Faith investment for extra holy burst damage.
